recommendations.overview: Fairy tales collide when Mambo and Munk tip the scales of good and evil once again.

recommendations.title: The Host
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl is captured by a giant mutated squid-like creature that appears from Seoul's Han River after toxic waste was dumped in it, prompting her family into a frantic search for her.

recommendations.director: Bob Richardson, Curt Geda, Steven E. Gordon

recommendations.title: Alligator 2: The Mutation
recommendations.overview: A giant mutated alligator runs riot in a small town after the sewer system washes it into a lake.

recommendations.title: Phase IV
recommendations.overview: Arizona ants mock the food chain on their way to a desert lab to get two scientists and a woman.

recommendations.title: Go Goa Gone
recommendations.overview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.

recommendations.title: Island of Terror
recommendations.overview: A small island community is overrun with creeping, blobbish, tentacled monsters which liquefy and digest the bones from living creatures. The community struggles to fight back.

recommendations.title: Nosferatu the Vampyre
recommendations.overview: A real estate agent leaves behind his beautiful wife to go to Transylvania to visit the mysterious Count Dracula and formalize the purchase of a property in Wismar.
